subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Ancient of Days, Who hath, through the splendors of His Most Great Name, illumined the realms of remembrance and utterance, and by His exalted Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد ساذج قدم را که بانوار اسم اعظم عوالم ذکر و بیان را منور نمود و بکلمه علیا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
